reasoning: Fenchlorphos (also known as ronnel) is an organophosphate insecticide with the structure O,O-dimethyl O-(2,4,5-trichlorophenyl) phosphorothioate, making it a thiophosphate triester where the phosphorothioate group is esterified with two methyl groups and one aryl group. It belongs to the class of organic thiophosphoric acid derivatives, specifically a thiophosphate triester.
